title: Blood Devil Sword rp
description:
This is a texture pack of "Blood Devil Sword [dp]"
this texture pack is made to support the Blood Devil sword data pack.
Download the Datapack then download Texture pack.
version from 1.16-latest
body:
This time I present you "Blood Devil Sword" Texture Pack.
This is a texture pack of "Blood Devil Sword [dp]"
this texture pack is made to support the Blood Devil sword data pack.
Download the Datapack then download Texture pack.

Optifine required for the texture pack
without Optifine texture pack may not work properly.

after applying the texture pack

changes are-

1)Blood Devil Sword Skin
2)Glowing in Dark
3)Totem Skin
4)small Totem
5)GUI [based on the Blood Devil Sword Theme]
6)side shield
7)clouds
8)end sky
9)red Enchanted Glint


Data Pack    -"Blood Devil Sword [dp]"
Texture Pack -"Blood Devil Sword [rp]"

Download both packs for proper experience.

This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files.


Enjoy the "Blood Devil Sword" Texture Pack.


THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
